name: Freddy Yeti/ The Refrigerator/ Date Everything
description: You might think of this monstrous giant as a big ice meanie, but he's anything but! Freddy welcomes all comers to sample his wares, wheter leftovers, fresh veggies, or even just to stare blankly at his insides several times a day. He thinks you are the coolest of cool kids.
creator: IndigotheHyena
